author: y4rr
content: Result: All 4 elision sites fixed. BN1d/2d/3d (lines :280, :331, :379) now sabotage-prepopulate running stats with sentinels (7.5/3.5), confirm sabotage took, then load fixture values via set_running_mean/var, then round-trip getter assert with 1e-9 tolerance. LazyBN1d (line :1679) explicitly materializes with fixture's num_features (asserted via num_features() getter), runs training+eval forward (existing), and adds a parallel BN1d cross-check that loads the fixture's running_mean/var via setters and asserts both lazy and parallel produce the fixture's expected output element-wise. Elision lines all removed. cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn: 1509 passed, 0 failed. cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean. cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision: 100% green (no regressions). Sabotage probe: replaced set_running_mean call with no-op; BN1d test failed with 'running_mean[0] round-trip mismatch (got=7.5, expected=0)' confirming the round-trip assertion is non-tautological. Reverted. Diff scope: test file only (236 insertions, 19 deletions); 0 src/ changes; 0 fixture changes.
